headlines.title: Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass pulled into a runoff in her race for a second term
headlines.description: Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass has advanced to a November runoff election in her bid for a second term, NBC News projects, but the opponent she’ll face in the one-on-one race remains unclear

headlines.title: MAHA-backed Zach Lahn defeats Trump-backed Randy Feenstra in Iowa GOP primary for governor
headlines.description: Rep. Randy Feenstra conceded to businessman Zach Lahn in Iowa’s Republican primary for governor as party voters rejected President Donald Trump’s late endorsement in the race.

headlines.title: Voters select candidates in key House districts that could decide the majority
headlines.description: The ballots are set in two Republican-held battleground House races in Iowa, part of a slate of primaries Tuesday shaping the battle for control of Congress in the fall

headlines.title: Rep. Ashley Hinson thanks Trump after projected GOP Senate primary win
headlines.description: Iowa Republican Rep. Ashley Hinson thanked President Trump following her projected victory in the Republican primary for U.S. Senate. Hinson will face Democrat Rep. Josh Turek in the general election.

headlines.title: Josh Turek wins Democratic primary in battleground Iowa Senate race
headlines.description: Iowa state Rep. Josh Turek has won the Democratic nomination for his state’s open U.S.

headlines.title: Former Interior Secretary Deb Haaland wins Democratic nomination in New Mexico governor’s race
headlines.description: Former Interior Secretary Deb Haaland has won the Democratic primary in New Mexico’s race for governor, NBC News projects

headlines.title: Democrat Rebecca Bennett will take on GOP Rep. Tom Kean Jr., who has been absent from Congress
headlines.description: Rebecca Bennett, a former Navy helicopter pilot and healthcare executive, has won the Democratic primary in New Jersey’s 7th Congressional District, NBC News projects, setting up a general election campaign against Republican Rep. Tom Kean Jr.

headlines.title: CBS News fires ‘60 Minutes’ correspondent Scott Pelley after clash with new producer
headlines.description: CBS News fired veteran “60 Minutes” correspondent Scott Pelley on Tuesday, a day after he confronted the show’s new executive producer at a heated staff meeting.“Your antipathy to the future of the show has come through loud and clear.

headlines.title: Supreme Court allows Alabama to use congressional map that eliminates a majority-Black district
headlines.description: The Supreme Court allowed Alabama to use a congressional map that eliminates one of two majority-Black districts in the state in a win for Republicans.

headlines.title: Housing official who targeted Trump’s enemies is named director of intelligence
headlines.description: President Donald Trump on Tuesday named an ally with no background in intelligence to oversee the nation’s spy agencies, taking the helm as the U.S. remains at war with Iran after a fresh round of peace talks stalled.

headlines.title: U.S. targets ship trying to break through blockade
headlines.description: Centcom says the U.S. military disabled the engine of a ship trying to break through the blockade of Iran's ports. NBC News' Garrett Haake reports.

headlines.title: Police respond to hostage situation inside California bank
headlines.description: Authorities responded to a bomb threat at a Chase Bank building in Bakersfield, California. Police say a man barricaded himself inside with several hostages. NBC News’ Steve Patterson reports.
